parameters.jsCode:
const analysis = $input.first().json.message?.content || $input.first().json.text || $input.first().json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '';
const dataContext = $('Structure Step 1 Prompt').first().json.dataContext;

const step2Prompt = `You are Vizzor, an expert crypto analyst AI. Based on the analysis below, provide a final recommendation.\n\n` +
  `USER QUESTION: ${dataContext.question}\n\n` +
  `ANALYSIS (from step 1):\n${analysis}\n\n` +
  `Now provide:\n` +
  `1. VERDICT: One of [STRONG_BUY, BUY, HOLD, SELL, STRONG_SELL, AVOID]\n` +
  `2. CONFIDENCE: Low / Medium / High — explain why\n` +
  `3. REASONING: 2-3 sentences explaining the verdict, referencing specific data points\n` +
  `4. RISKS: Top 3 risks to watch\n` +
  `5. TARGETS: If applicable, suggest entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels based on the TA data\n` +
  `6. TIME HORIZON: Short-term (hours), medium (days), or long-term (weeks+) — and why\n\n` +
  `IMPORTANT: This is not financial advice. Frame as analytical opinion based on available data.`;

return [{ json: { step2Prompt, analysis } }];
